calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF BIRTH
Off Calendar Aug-22-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was called with case number PES-11-294895 (Petition to Establish Fact of Birth Re: Sherydahn Reine Nartissa De Leon.

Appearances: Sherydahn Reine Nartissa De Leon in Propria Persona. Thaddeus Vincent De Leon in Propria Persona.

Ms. De Leon explained the realationships they had/have with Henry Sun, the Father and the Mother. The Court granted both petitions (subject to receipt of revised orders).

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.
